ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "time_generated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was generated */,
  "event_vendor" TEXT /* Vendor of the device event */,
  "event_product" TEXT /* Product associated with the event */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the device */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the device */,
  "first_seen" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device was first seen */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device */,
  "last_seen" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device was last seen */,
  "mac_address" TEXT /* MAC address of the device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "operating_system_version" TEXT /* Operating system version the device runs */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Name of the operating system */,
  "plc_module" TEXT /* PLC module associated with the device */,
  "purdue_level" INTEGER /* Purdue level indicating the device's security classification */,
  "risk_level" INTEGER /* Risk level associated with the device */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor if applicable */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor if applicable */,
  "site_location" TEXT /* Physical location of the device */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site where the device is located */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the device */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., sensor, controller) */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility status of the device in the management system */,
  "name" TEXT /* User-friendly name of the device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number of the device */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the device */,
  "last_firmware_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last firmware update */,
  "last_os_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last operating system update */,
  "last_location_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last location update */,
  "last_event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the last event log entry for this device */,
  "last_event_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last event log entry for this device */,
  "last_event_type" TEXT /* Type of the last event log entry for this device */,
  "alert_threshold" TEXT /* Threshold for generating alerts */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Current alert status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_site_name FOREIGN KEY ("site_name") REFERENCES sites ("site_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES device_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_logs" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event log */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device that generated the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event generated (e.g., alert, status update) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the event */,
  "event_source" TEXT /* Source of the event */,
  "event_data" TEXT /* Additional data or metadata associated with the event */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of any alerts triggered by this event */,
  "handled_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who handled the event, if applicable */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event was resolved, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the device type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the site */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* User who performed the maintenance */,
  "performed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the maintenance was performed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Current status of the alert */,
  "handled_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who handled the alert, if applicable */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was resolved, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_handled_by FOREIGN KEY ("handled_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)
